comments.author: @NgocAnh-metub
comments.text: Hi team, mình có theo dõi nội dung của kênh và thấy khá phù hợp với một dự án hợp tác bên mình đang triển khai. Team cho mình xin thông tin liên hệ phù hợp để trao đổi chi tiết hơn nha. Cảm ơn team nhiều ạ

comments.author: @mysteryvault-h2o
comments.text: I always thought of Wales as just part of the UK, but this really made it feel like a country with its own identity, history, and culture. Definitely changed my perspective.

replies.author: @TruePlanetOffical
replies.text: Thank you so much—that really means a lot to us. If this documentary helped you see Wales in a new light, then we've done our job. Thanks for watching, and if you enjoy exploring places beyond the usual tourist path, please like, subscribe, and share the channel with someone who loves travel too!
